title: Prospectus
metaDescription: Read the Rosehill College prospectus — our academic programme, co-curricular activities, values and facilities for Years 9 to 13.

sections.heading: Prospectus
sections.lede: Our prospectus provides an in-depth look at what makes our school a unique and vibrant learning community. Inside, you will find information about our academic programmes, co-curricular activities, school culture, and facilities. Discover how we support our students' growth and prepare them for future success.

sections.heading: Read the prospectus
sections.note: Trouble viewing? Open the prospectus in a new tab.

sections.heading: Like what you see?
sections.text: Start your enrolment at Rosehill College today, or get in touch if you have any questions.
